title: Killer Host's More Ores
description: Really usefull new ores to your survival  gameplay.
body:
This mod has no sense, its just things that will help you with no expecific theme.
Featuring:
-2 wings
-3 new biomes
-1 new dimension
-4 new ores, 2 gems and 1 new bar
-1 new wood type
-1 new chest
-Other things that i forgot

The new dimension has only 1 structure (yet) but is very cool to explore, and the new wings will help you build or explore with limited flight time.

F.A.Q. (is not frequent, in fact no one asked)

1. Is there will be a port for newer version?
-no, at least not now, because of mc creator being trash.

2. Is there will be a port to neoforge?
-no, for the same reason.

3. You will update the mod frequently?
-dont expect that, i will update when i think i added enough content to you guys try out or to fix a bug, but i can, and will stop develop the mod when i get bored, and return months later with an idea and return  to development.

4. When will be the full release?
-when the initial mod idea that i have be completed (duhhh).

PS: In the discord server, we only speak portuguese, so you a translator if you dont know how to speak portuguese.

UPDATE: i lost the archives from the mod, so if i ever return (probably on november/december or maybe not because i will be busy with my personal RPG that i stream) except a full overhaul
